name: Marinated Steak Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sirloin steak, cut into 2" cubes
1 large Green pepper, cut into 1" pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in oil; remove from heat.
2. Stir in lemon juice, soy sauce, Worcesteshire sauce, and mustard.
3. Pour over meat and vegetables. Cover and marinate overnight in refrigerator.
4. Remove meat and vegetables from marinade, reserving the marinade.
5. Alternate meat and vegetables on skewers.
6. Grill 5 minutes on each side over medium coals or until desired degree of doneness, brushing frequently with marinade.
